description: Approved Dashboard Collection-based dataset presentation references. Generated Dashboard Collection controls must select one of these references and preserve the selected template structure; unknown or simplified Collection layouts are not generated-final eligible.

references.sourceReference: Collection control card-style responsive grid standard and template library
whenToUse: Users need to browse business records as cards.
The dataset has a small to medium field set with visual status, owner, date, or summary metadata.
Card scanning is more useful than dense row comparison.
whenNotToUse: The requirement asks for table headers, column alignment, or grid-table scanning.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_responsive_card_grid for the Dashboard dataset region and explain the card-browsing business reason.
generationProof: item template with current item bindings
references.proofBoundary: Export-proven card pattern only; not proof for grid-table, row-list, grouped, nested, gallery, timeline, or Kanban layouts.

references.displayName: Responsive Card Collection With Multiselect Toolbar
references.sourceReference: Company Overview v1.3 / Collection card multiple select / card_with_multiselect_toolbar_wrapper
whenToUse: Users need card browsing plus multi-record selection.
The business action is batch update, batch close, batch archive, batch approve, or batch delete on card records.
whenNotToUse: Bulk operations cannot be expressed with the export-proven Collection action shape.
Only a read-only dashboard card list is needed.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_card_with_multiselect_toolbar and identify the batch operation business need.
references.proofBoundary: Do not infer grid-table checkbox-column behavior from this card pattern.
exportShapeContract: preserve Collection root attrs.actions and multiselect action settings
include page-level filterVars, tempVars, actions, filter, and formAction dependencies
allow edits only in card_col_title_wrapper, op_normal, op_multipleselected, card_col_item, and card_col_item_operations

references.sourceReference: Projects Center dashboard/page Collection grid-table export study
whenToUse: The dataset has several comparable fields such as status, owner, due date, priority, progress, or category.
A Collection item template is required instead of a plain Data table.
whenNotToUse: Only simple tabular data is required and Data table is explicitly requested.
The data should be shown as cards, Kanban, timeline, grouped, nested, or gallery.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_grid_table for the Dashboard dataset region and explain the dense scanning need.

references.sourceReference: Projects Center / Project Tasks export-proven source reference
whenToUse: Users need dense table scanning plus multi-row selection.
The business process needs batch assign, batch close, batch approve, batch status update, batch reminder, batch archive, batch export, or batch delete.
whenNotToUse: Users need card selection rather than table selection.
Batch operations cannot be represented with export-proven Collection actions.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_grid_table_with_multiselect and name the concrete batch operation. Projects Center / Project Tasks is the source proof only, not a business-domain restriction.
generationProof: Collection root attrs.actions[] with type coll
references.proofBoundary: May be used for any matching Dashboard dataset, not only Project Tasks; runtime execution still needs focused proof.

references.sourceReference: Projects Center grid-table search/fulltext export study
whenToUse: Users need dense row/column scanning and free-text search.
The dashboard region is a document library, request history, audit list, or operational table with many records.
whenNotToUse: Only fixed dropdown filters are required.
The region should be a card list.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_grid_table_with_search and name the fields/search purpose.
references.proofBoundary: Search linkage is structural proof; runtime before/after search proof remains separate.

references.sourceReference: Marketing Event Management Event Portfolio Dashboard Golden Reference
whenToUse: The Dashboard needs a high-fidelity primary operations list.
Rows need rich status badge, progress, owner/person, health, budget/date, or similar visual cells.
The region is the main dashboard work queue, pipeline, or portfolio table.
whenNotToUse: A lightweight secondary list is enough.
The business asks for cards or bulk checkbox selection.
The region does not need the richer Event Portfolio visual treatment.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select Event Pipeline Grid-Table and map business fields to the reference columns without copying Marketing Event fields.
references.proofBoundary: Use as component region inside Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 slots; do not copy the Event Portfolio root shell.
